# 照顧者支持問卷回應範例 - 臺灣長期照顧實作指引 (Taiwan Long-Term Care Implementation Guide) v0.4.1

* [**Table of Contents**](toc.md)
* [**Artifacts Summary**](artifacts.md)
* **照顧者支持問卷回應範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 照顧者支持問卷回應範例

Profile: [照顧管理評估量表－主要照顧者工作與支持](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSCaregiverSupport.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-caregiver-support-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[LTCQuestionnaireCaregiverSupport](Questionnaire-ltc-questionnaire-caregiver-support.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)K1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問您是否與個案同住？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)K2
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 若您有事必須外出，一天之中（二十四小時），請問您可將個案單獨留置家中幾小時沒有問題？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 三小時～未滿六小時
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)K3
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 有無照顧其他失能家人或 3 歲以下幼兒？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 沒有，僅個案 1 人
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)K4
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問您已經照顧個案多久？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 一年以上
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)K5
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問您過去 1 個月的健康狀況好不好？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 好
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)K6
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 整體來說，您覺得您生活品質好不好？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 尚可
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)K7
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問您目前有沒有在工作？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)K8
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請寫出其他有關訪問過程、個案（家屬）期許或其他如虐待、疏忽、需緊急就醫、自費等特殊狀況或問題：
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 無
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format



## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "ltc-questionnaire-response-caregiver-support-example",
  "meta" : {
    "profile" : ["http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/StructureDefinition/LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSCaregiverSupport"]
  },
  "questionnaire" : "http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/Questionnaire/ltc-questionnaire-caregiver-support",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-cms-chen-ming-hui-example"
  },
  "authored" : "2024-09-15T11:05:00+08:00",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "K1",
    "text" : "請問您是否與個案同住？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : true
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "K2",
    "text" : "若您有事必須外出，一天之中（二十四小時），請問您可將個案單獨留置家中幾小時沒有問題？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "三小時～未滿六小時"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "K3",
    "text" : "有無照顧其他失能家人或 3 歲以下幼兒？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "沒有，僅個案 1 人"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "K4",
    "text" : "請問您已經照顧個案多久？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "一年以上"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "K5",
    "text" : "請問您過去 1 個月的健康狀況好不好？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "好"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "K6",
    "text" : "整體來說，您覺得您生活品質好不好？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "尚可"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "K7",
    "text" : "請問您目前有沒有在工作？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "K8",
    "text" : "請寫出其他有關訪問過程、個案（家屬）期許或其他如虐待、疏忽、需緊急就醫、自費等特殊狀況或問題：",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "無"
    }]
  }]
}

```
